name: Mock (Zucchini) Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Zucchini; peeled, seeded, and sliced 1/8 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------TOPPING----------------------------------
1/2 cup Margarine; softened
1/2 cup Sugar
1/2 cup Flour
Mix all Pie ingredients together and place in a deep dish unbaked pie shell.
Combine the Topping ingredients and pour on top of pie.
Bake at 375°F for one hour. Dot top of pie with margarine.
